final_prompt.prompt:
Design an original, non-infringing avatar for a content creator focusing on new energy vehicles, digital products, and lifestyle recommendations.

Style/medium: needs a globally harmonious, culturally neutral aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: needs a balanced, versatile layout that reads well at small scale — exact framing is yours
Subject: must include visual elements suggesting new energy vehicles, digital tech, and lifestyle goods (abstracted or symbolic)
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs a clean, approachable atmosphere — exact light treatment is yours
Color palette: needs a universally acceptable, non-provocative direction — exact color choices are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must avoid culturally sensitive symbols, religious imagery, region-specific flags, or potentially offensive visual references; must work harmoniously across Chinese and international social platforms
Avoid: must avoid any imagery that could trigger cultural, political, or religious sensitivities in specific populations
